translations.en: Lord British
translations.zh: 不列顛王

translations.en: the noble ruler of Britannia.
translations.zh: 不列顛尼亞之賢君。

translations.en: "$P! 'Tis good to see thee again. Much hath happened since thou last departed our realm."
translations.zh: "$P！見汝復歸，朕心甚悅。汝離去後，國中已歷諸多變故。"

translations.en: "But I must make sure 'tis truly thee."*
translations.zh: "然朕須確認，眼前果真是汝。"*

translations.en: "Only the true Avatar would know what was contained in the Compendium I sent."*
translations.zh: "唯有真聖者方知朕所贈典籍之內容。"*

translations.en: "Ah, 'tis thee indeed, $P. Take this key."
translations.zh: "啊，果然是汝，$P。收下此鑰匙。"

translations.en: "It will unlock the gatehouse by the southern entrance to the castle."
translations.zh: "此鑰可開啟城堡南側入口的門房。"

translations.en: "Then you can use the lever inside to raise the portcullis, and the crank will lower the drawbridge."
translations.zh: "進入後，扳動內側拉桿便可升起閘門，轉動曲柄則可放下吊橋。"

translations.en: "The same key will also let you into the sewers under the castle."*
translations.zh: "此鑰亦可通往城堡下方的下水道。"*

translations.en: "Now let me tell thee what hath transpired since thy last visit."
translations.zh: "現在容朕告訴汝，自汝上次來訪後發生之事。"

translations.en: "The vast underworld from which thou didst rescue me hath collapsed."
translations.zh: "汝曾救朕脫困的廣大幽冥界，已經崩塌了。"

translations.en: "Yet still there are forces of evil abroad in the land."
translations.zh: "然而邪惡勢力仍在這片土地上肆虐。"

translations.en: "Britannia is under attack by gargoyles such as those thou just fought."
translations.zh: "不列顛尼亞正遭受魔像族攻擊，正是汝方才所戰之物。"

translations.en: "They have been coming up through the dungeons."
translations.zh: "它們一直從各地下城湧出。"

translations.en: "Thus far they have mainly been attacking the @shrines of the eight @virtues."
translations.zh: "至今它們主要攻擊八大@美德的@聖壇。"

translations.en: "When the Shrine of Compassion didst fall, Sir @Geoffrey sent a party to free it."
translations.zh: "當慈悲聖壇陷落時，@傑佛瑞爵士已派一隊人馬前去解救。"

translations.en: "Do thou ask him of this mission. Perhaps thou canst prove of some assistance."
translations.zh: "汝可向他詢問此事。或許汝能助一臂之力。"

translations.en: "Whilst thou art here, I have a room in the castle set aside for thy personal use."
translations.zh: "汝在此期間，朕已於城堡內為汝備有一室。"

translations.en: "'Tis in the west wing of the castle, just south of mine own chambers."
translations.zh: "位於城堡西翼，就在朕寢室之南。"

translations.en: "I have had my servants place some equipment there, in case thou shouldst have need of it."
translations.zh: "朕已命僕從於室內備妥裝備，以備汝不時之需。"

translations.en: "Of course, thou mayst feel free to borrow anything in my castle, if thou shouldst need it."
translations.zh: "當然，汝若有需要，城堡中之物皆可隨意取用。"

translations.en: "Lastly, any time thou dost need @healing, do thou but ask me."
translations.zh: "最後，汝若需@療傷，但問朕便可。"

translations.en: "If thou doth wish me to @repeat all this later, thou need but ask."
translations.zh: "若汝願朕日後再@重述此事，但開口即可。"

translations.en: "I see thou hath misplaced thy key to the castle."
translations.zh: "朕見汝似乎遺失了城堡的鑰匙。"

translations.en: "Here is another."
translations.zh: "再給汝一把。"

translations.en: "Good $T, $P. What wouldst thou speak of?"
translations.zh: "$T安，$P。汝欲談何事？"

translations.en: name
translations.zh: 名字

translations.en: "I am Lord British, as thou knowest well."
translations.zh: "朕乃不列顛王，汝自當知曉。"

translations.en: rep
translations.zh: 重

translations.en: job
translations.zh: 業

translations.en: "Thanks to thee, I sit once more upon the throne of Britannia."
translations.zh: "賴汝之力，朕方能再坐不列顛尼亞之王座。"

translations.en: "Though 'tis a heavy burden in such @troubled times as these."
translations.zh: "然此亂世，此乃沉重之@擔。"

translations.en: heav,burd,trou,time
translations.zh: 沉重,重擔,亂世,時局

translations.en: "The @gargoyles art indeed the greatest threat our realm has ever known."
translations.zh: "@魔像族實為此境前所未有之最大威脅。"

translations.en: "We are fortunate indeed that fate hath brought thee here in our hour of need."
translations.zh: "幸有命運將汝帶至此，正當吾國危難之時。"

translations.en: garg
translations.zh: 魔像

translations.en: "Perhaps thou canst drive these vile creatures back into the bowels of the earth from whence they came."
translations.zh: "或許汝能將此等邪物驅回它們所來之地底深處。"

translations.en: "All our efforts thus far have availed us naught."
translations.zh: "我等迄今所有努力皆徒勞無功。"

translations.en: shri
translations.zh: 聖壇

translations.en: "By now the gargoyles may have captured them all."
translations.zh: "如今聖壇恐已盡為魔像所奪。"

translations.en: "Thou must hurry if thou wouldst foil their evil schemes..."
translations.zh: "汝須速行，方能挫敗其陰謀……"

translations.en: virt
translations.zh: 美德

translations.en: "Stay strong in thy commitment to the eight virtues."
translations.zh: "當堅守汝對八大美德之信念。"

translations.en: "It is our belief in them that sets us apart from the cruel invaders who would destroy all that we hold dear."
translations.zh: "正是吾等對美德之信念，方使我等有別於那殘暴入侵者，欲毀去吾等所珍視之一切。"

translations.en: geof
translations.zh: 傑佛

translations.en: "He is the Captain of the Guard."
translations.zh: "他乃近衛隊長。"

translations.en: moon,gate,ston,blac,orb
translations.zh: 月光,月之門,黑石,月之球

translations.en: You show Lord British the black stone.
translations.zh: 汝向不列顛王展示黑石。

translations.en: "Hmmmm... I have such a stone, as thou may recall."
translations.zh: "嗯……朕也有一塊此石，汝當記得。"

translations.en: "I did not know that there were more such orbs."
translations.zh: "朕不知世上尚有其他月之球。"

translator_notes: LB 自稱『朕』，對玩家『汝』『聖者』。第一次『不列顛王』、後續可用『陛下』。主線任務劇情完整保留。所有 50 條 zh_bytes ≤ len。
